target: I'm sorry... You must hate me now, right?
...You're the worst!! You're really the worst!!
But there's no way I could ever hate you, Tokiko!
Why did things have to end up like this!?
Becoming a Shadow on your own! Trying to protect me!
Don't just decide on your own that it's for my sake! Don't just shoulder it all by yourself and suffer!
Why... why didn't you talk to me about it, even just a little...!?
There's no way... I could do that...
There's no way I could say it! That I was helping a monster like that! I absolutely didn't want you to find out, Mio!

I'm sorry, Mio…
It's over now…
Are you still saying that? Please just give up already.
Toki-chan, you can still start over. So become our ally!
Wh-What are you saying? I... Ushio-san... I...!
Even so, I won't kill you, Toki-chan.
The one at fault isn't you, Toki-chan. It's Haine and Shide.
That's why I won't forgive them, and I'll definitely defeat them.
And to do that, I need your help, Toki-chan!
Even without relying on Ushio, there must definitely be a way to sever the link with Haine!
So let's start over! Right, Tokiko!
(The restraints came undone? My body... I can move!)
(Toki-chan is suffering. What on earth is happening!?)
Things are almost settled on this end. Kill every last one of them over there too.
Something's been strange for a while now! What's wrong!?
D-Don't tell me...! Haine is using telepathy on Toki-chan!?
You can't, Tokiko! You don't have to listen to Haine's orders!
(It's no good... I won't make it in time!)
(I reflexively fired the nail gun, but they all missed...!)
(I don't want to hurt her too much, but if I can somehow weaken her—)
